name: Workers comp denied my claim for "lack of causation"—what now?
description: Get a medical opinion specifically linking your condition to work. Appeal with expert testimony. Most denials are overturned with proper evidence.

mainEntity.name: Workers comp denied my claim for "lack of causation"—what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Get a medical opinion specifically linking your condition to work. Appeal with expert testimony. Most denials are overturned with proper evidence.
